ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major shareholder */,
  "shareholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the major shareholder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the shareholder */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the shareholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the shareholder */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the major shareholder (e.g., company description) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shareholder was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the shareholder's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership was reported */,
  "shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held by the shareholder */,
  "previous_shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held in the previous quarter */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Market value of the shares held */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the market value */,
  "portfolio_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the shareholder's portfolio */,
  "quarterly_change" TEXT /* Quarterly change in the number of shares held */,
  "company_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership percentage in the company */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the ownership record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_records_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_records_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical ownership record */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership change was reported */,
  "shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Market value of the shares held */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the market value */,
  "portfolio_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the shareholder's portfolio */,
  "quarterly_change" TEXT /* Quarterly change in the number of shares held */,
  "company_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership percentage in the company */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for significant changes in ownership */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the ownership change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_history_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each major shareholder
Additional details about the major shareholder (e.g., company description)
Timestamp when the shareholder was added to the system
Timestamp of the last update to the shareholder's information
